content_body:
A girl's weekend getaway to Blue Ridge, GA, can be a fun and relaxing experience. Sometimes all you’re looking forward to is just staying put in your luxury Blue Ridge cabin and doing what you love best - catching up on each other’s lives, cooking delicious meals, sitting out on the covered porches reveling in the mountain beauty and fresh air, and just being still.

Others may want to explore and experience all that Blue Ridge has to offer. Whether you enjoy exploring the great outdoors or just relaxing in your luxury cabin lodging, Blue Ridge offers a variety of things to do.

First Day:

Though getting your girl gang together in one place might be a challenge, meeting everyone at your luxury cabin is well worth the planning stage. Once you check in and get settled in your new home for the next few days, visit Hook and Eye Rooftop Bar for some classy cocktails while overlooking downtown Blue Ridge!

Second Day:

Engage in the best retail therapy by exploring downtown Blue Ridge! From antique shops to custom jewelry and from art galleries to specially crafted olive oil, Blue Ridge has it all. For lunch, savor authentic Cuban sandwiches at Rum Cake Lady just steps away from Main Street. 

From there, head to Mercier Orchards for hard cider, a wine tasting, and some fresh fried apple pies! To end your evening on an even higher note, return to downtown for dinner at Ferraro's and indulge your taste buds with a phenomenal wine list and Italian food!

If a more exhilarating day appeals to your group, the potential for outdoor adventures thrives in Blue Ridge! Whether you seek hiking, zip-lining, kayaking, or rafting, the North Georgia Mountains boast many opportunities for adrenaline seekers!

Third-Day:

On the tail end of your weekend, treat yourself and your best friends to massages, facials, or pedi/manicures at Serenity in the Mountains or TeaTrees Boutique Spa! Blue Ridge is known for its relaxing atmosphere, and no girl's getaway would be complete without a spa treatment.

After your blissful treatment, visit some of North Georgia's finest wineries and unwind with your girlfriends in a serenely beautiful setting. Bear Claw Vineyards is one of our favorites!

Since you and your best friends have been exploring so much, bring the best food to you by hiring Blue Duck to prepare one last divine meal in Blue Ridge! Preparing a multi-course meal for you and your best friends, Chef Steven Lash will make your North Georgia vacation that much more memorable with his culinary expertise.

Though "see you next time" is always bittersweet, carry the memories made on your girls' getaway home with you, and start planning your next vacation to the North Georgia Mountains!

Girl Getaway Memories:

"Awesome girls' trip weekend! The cabin was the perfect layout for our group. Loved the curved sofa for socializing in the evenings. Beautiful views and a convenient location for all of our adventures. The beds were very comfortable, and the sheets were soft. Views were very nice from all rooms, not just the main living room. All in all Serendipity on Noontootla Creek is a beautiful home!" 

"We had the absolute best cabin vacation in Blue Ridge this year! We loved the hikes and hot tub! The view is so beautiful and cool. We sat and ate out on the deck and had a fire in the firepit. We hiked to so many beautiful places. Saw lots of waterfalls and enjoyed our rainy movie day. The pool table and arcade games were awesome. We shared wonderful meals and the beds were so comfortable ~ we slept so well! Thanks for sharing this wonderful place with us." Above the Timberline

"We decided to take our annual girls' trip to Blue Ridge this year. The scenery is gorgeous and it was close to Atlanta. There were 9 of us in the Riverview Lodge and it was perfect. Plenty of room, huge stocked kitchen, very clean and being on the Toccoa River was an extra bonus. We had a blast and wish we would have stayed an extra day!"
title: Girls Getaway Weekend
